data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_JoshuaIn: The TRICK MASTER always vanishes\nlike smoke. How does he do it?
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_JoshuaDe: Aiyeeeh! You're much too strong!\nHow do you do it?
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_JoshuaPo: I wish I could appear and disappear as\nif I were smoke, too.
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_Patricia: Going around the same spot...\nIt begets ill fortune...
I've circled the same spot over ten\ntimes now... It's ill fortune...
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_AlexisIn: Whoever wins will get through here\nfirst. That's the feeling I get.
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_AlexisPo: You're solving all the puzzles in the\nTRICK HOUSE. That's the feeling I get.
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_WroteSec: {PLAYER} wrote down the secret code\non the door.\p“TRICK MASTER I love.”\n... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...\pThe lock clicked open!
